chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3808 of 2015 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.16909/2015. 2. For hearing of main petition. 30.01.2025 Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zuhaid, advocate holding brief for Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Comments filed on behalf of the respondent 3 are taken on record. It is submitted that finalization of assessment is pending orders of this petition. It is further stated that the assessment may be finalized after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending such finalization no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Counsel for the department states that petition may be disposed of as above. Order accordingly. The amount secured shall be subject to outcome of the aforesaid. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
